userStories.title: Pre-sprint: map available AEAT design documents for all priority models
acceptanceCriteria: Visit official AEAT design pages for 100-199, 200-299 and required 300-399 priority model 303
Record available formats, file URL, parser status and reason for priority models 100, 111, 115, 123, 124, 187, 193, 196, 198, 200, 216, 289, 290, 296, 303
Check technical help pages for 289, 290 and 296 where design index is not enough
Write docs/aeat-docs-map.md
Do not load data in this story

userStories.title: Load Modelo 296 complete design - IRNR no residentes
acceptanceCriteria: Download official AEAT Modelo 296 2024 design PDF
Extract deterministic fields with position, nature/type, name and description
Load all safe fields into modelo_casilla for the active campaign
Load claves/subclaves and format notes where deterministic
Replace seed/partial records, do not append duplicates
Preserve source_url, source_hash and capture date through the existing traceability mechanism
Only set verified/completeness if the model contract is actually satisfied
userStories.verificationCommand: COMPOSE='docker compose -f infra/deploy/docker-compose.prod.yml'; COUNT=$($COMPOSE exec postgres psql -U $PGUSER -d $PGDATABASE -tAc "SELECT COUNT(*) FROM modelo_casilla cs JOIN modelo_campana c ON cs.campana_id=c.id JOIN aeat_modelo m ON m.id=c.modelo_id WHERE m.codigo='296' AND c.activo=true"); echo "296 casillas: $COUNT"; [ "$COUNT" -gt 10 ] && echo PASS || echo FAIL-STILL-SEED-DATA

userStories.title: Load Modelo 216 complete design - IRNR retenciones no residentes
acceptanceCriteria: Parse official 216 XLSX from AEAT
Load all deterministic fields and notes
Replace partial records safely
Set completeness only according to the truth contract
userStories.verificationCommand: COMPOSE='docker compose -f infra/deploy/docker-compose.prod.yml'; COUNT=$($COMPOSE exec postgres psql -U $PGUSER -d $PGDATABASE -tAc "SELECT COUNT(*) FROM modelo_casilla cs JOIN modelo_campana c ON cs.campana_id=c.id JOIN aeat_modelo m ON m.id=c.modelo_id WHERE m.codigo='216' AND c.activo=true"); echo "216 casillas: $COUNT"; [ "$COUNT" -gt 5 ] && echo PASS || echo FAIL

acceptanceCriteria: Parse official 193 PDF design-register table
Load declarant/detail records and deterministic claves
Preserve official traceability

acceptanceCriteria: Parse official 187 PDF design-register table
Load only deterministic fields
Document any unparseable section as partial
userStories.verificationCommand: COMPOSE='docker compose -f infra/deploy/docker-compose.prod.yml'; COUNT=$($COMPOSE exec postgres psql -U $PGUSER -d $PGDATABASE -tAc "SELECT COUNT(*) FROM modelo_casilla cs JOIN modelo_campana c ON cs.campana_id=c.id JOIN aeat_modelo m ON m.id=c.modelo_id WHERE m.codigo='187' AND c.activo=true"); echo "187 casillas: $COUNT"; [ "$COUNT" -gt 5 ] && echo PASS || echo FAIL

userStories.title: Load Modelo 123 and 124 complete designs - retenciones IS/IRPF
acceptanceCriteria: Parse official 123 XLS and 124 XLSX
Load deterministic fields for both models
Preserve official traceability
userStories.verificationCommand: COMPOSE='docker compose -f infra/deploy/docker-compose.prod.yml'; for C in 123 124; do COUNT=$($COMPOSE exec postgres psql -U $PGUSER -d $PGDATABASE -tAc "SELECT COUNT(*) FROM modelo_casilla cs JOIN modelo_campana c ON cs.campana_id=c.id JOIN aeat_modelo m ON m.id=c.modelo_id WHERE m.codigo='$C' AND c.activo=true"); echo "$C casillas: $COUNT"; done && echo PASS

userStories.title: Load Modelo 289 complete design - CRS/DAC2 cuentas financieras
acceptanceCriteria: Use official 289 XSD/WSDL and technical manual pages
Parse deterministic XSD elements
Keep partial contract if XSD proves technical message only and not full procedural guidance
userStories.verificationCommand: COMPOSE='docker compose -f infra/deploy/docker-compose.prod.yml'; $COMPOSE exec postgres psql -U $PGUSER -d $PGDATABASE -c "SELECT m.codigo, m.completeness, m.verified, COUNT(cs.id) AS casillas FROM aeat_modelo m LEFT JOIN modelo_campana c ON c.modelo_id=m.id AND c.activo=true LEFT JOIN modelo_casilla cs ON cs.campana_id=c.id WHERE m.codigo='289' GROUP BY m.codigo, m.completeness, m.verified;" && echo PASS

userStories.title: Verify and complete Modelo 100 - IRPF declaracion anual
acceptanceCriteria: Verify 100 casillas came from official XSD/properties
Reload from official source if provenance is missing
Ensure contract remains honest
userStories.verificationCommand: COMPOSE='docker compose -f infra/deploy/docker-compose.prod.yml'; $COMPOSE exec postgres psql -U $PGUSER -d $PGDATABASE -c "SELECT m.codigo, m.completeness, m.verified, COUNT(cs.id) AS casillas FROM aeat_modelo m LEFT JOIN modelo_campana c ON c.modelo_id=m.id AND c.activo=true LEFT JOIN modelo_casilla cs ON cs.campana_id=c.id WHERE m.codigo='100' GROUP BY m.codigo, m.completeness, m.verified;" | grep -v '| 0 ' && echo PASS || echo FAIL-NO-CASILLAS-100

userStories.title: Verify and complete Modelo 200 - Impuesto Sociedades
acceptanceCriteria: Verify 200 coverage and provenance against official XLS
Reload if seed/provenance gap is found
userStories.verificationCommand: COMPOSE='docker compose -f infra/deploy/docker-compose.prod.yml'; $COMPOSE exec postgres psql -U $PGUSER -d $PGDATABASE -c "SELECT m.codigo, m.completeness, m.verified, COUNT(cs.id) AS casillas FROM aeat_modelo m LEFT JOIN modelo_campana c ON c.modelo_id=m.id AND c.activo=true LEFT JOIN modelo_casilla cs ON cs.campana_id=c.id WHERE m.codigo='200' GROUP BY m.codigo, m.completeness, m.verified;" | grep -v '| 0 ' && echo PASS || echo FAIL-NO-CASILLAS-200

userStories.title: Verify and complete Modelo 303 - IVA autoliquidacion
acceptanceCriteria: Verify 303 coverage against official 300-399 XLSX
Reload if current data is seed/partial without source traceability
userStories.verificationCommand: COMPOSE='docker compose -f infra/deploy/docker-compose.prod.yml'; COUNT=$($COMPOSE exec postgres psql -U $PGUSER -d $PGDATABASE -tAc "SELECT COUNT(*) FROM modelo_casilla cs JOIN modelo_campana c ON cs.campana_id=c.id JOIN aeat_modelo m ON m.id=c.modelo_id WHERE m.codigo='303' AND c.activo=true"); echo "303 casillas: $COUNT"; [ "$COUNT" -gt 20 ] && echo PASS || echo FAIL

userStories.title: Verify and complete Modelos 111 and 115
acceptanceCriteria: Parse or verify official 111 and 115 XLS designs
Set contract only from actual source coverage
userStories.verificationCommand: COMPOSE='docker compose -f infra/deploy/docker-compose.prod.yml'; for C in 111 115; do COUNT=$($COMPOSE exec postgres psql -U $PGUSER -d $PGDATABASE -tAc "SELECT COUNT(*) FROM modelo_casilla cs JOIN modelo_campana c ON cs.campana_id=c.id JOIN aeat_modelo m ON m.id=c.modelo_id WHERE m.codigo='$C' AND c.activo=true"); echo "$C casillas: $COUNT"; done && echo PASS

userStories.title: Sweep: load all remaining models with official docs in priority range
acceptanceCriteria: From docs/aeat-docs-map.md, process STATUS-A models not already covered
Batch by format type and never mix parser logic
Document every skipped section
userStories.verificationCommand: COMPOSE='docker compose -f infra/deploy/docker-compose.prod.yml'; $COMPOSE exec postgres psql -U $PGUSER -d $PGDATABASE -c "SELECT COUNT(*) AS total, SUM(CASE WHEN casillas > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS loaded FROM (SELECT m.codigo, COALESCE(SUM(cs_count.n),0) AS casillas FROM aeat_modelo m LEFT JOIN modelo_campana c ON c.modelo_id=m.id AND c.activo=true LEFT JOIN (SELECT campana_id, COUNT(*) n FROM modelo_casilla GROUP BY campana_id) cs_count ON cs_count.campana_id=c.id WHERE m.codigo::int BETWEEN 100 AND 299 GROUP BY m.codigo) sub;" && echo 'Verify loaded > previous baseline' || echo FAIL

userStories.title: Final documentation coverage report
acceptanceCriteria: Write docs/aeat-documentation-coverage-report.md
Every 1XX/2XX model has covered, partial, no-casillas-expected, deprecated or documented blocker status
mcp_validation_suite and mcp_deep_contract_audit pass
userStories.verificationCommand: test -f docs/aeat-documentation-coverage-report.md && docker compose -f infra/deploy/docker-compose.prod.yml run --rm worker python mcp_validation_suite.py 2>&1 | grep 'ok=true' && echo PASS || echo FAIL
